name: coinnect
description: Find the cheapest way to send money between any two currencies. Compares 22+ crypto exchanges and 19 remittance providers in real-time.
author: Coinnect

tools.name: coinnect_quote
tools.description: Find the cheapest routes to send money from one currency to another. Returns routes ranked by total cost with step-by-step instructions.

from.description: Source currency code (e.g., USD, EUR, BTC)

to.description: Destination currency code (e.g., MXN, NGN, PHP)

tools.name: coinnect_corridors
tools.description: List the most active currency corridors with provider information.

tools.name: coinnect_verify
tools.description: Report a real rate you observed at a provider. Helps calibrate estimated rates. You earn quest rewards for verified reports.

tools.name: coinnect_quests
tools.description: List open rate verification bounties. Complete quests by verifying rates and earn rewards.

pricing.rate_limit: 20 req/day anonymous, 1000/day with free API key
pricing.api_key: POST /v1/keys to generate instantly, no signup
